title: Simply Natural Biomes
description: A collection of new vanilla friendly biomes to improve your adventuring!
body:
![Simply Natural Biomes Logo](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1406433/description_c6c928cb-0ac1-4206-ac4f-e93f7b1e1487.png) Simply Natural Biomes is a minecraft mod with a collection of vanilla friendly biomes that are close to something Mojang would add to the game. Currently, this mod only has one biome. Biomes are listed below. * **The Aspen Woods**. This biome contains tall pale trees topped with golden orange leaves with boulders dotted around the forest floor and is home to a large number of rabbits. These trees given a new full golden autumn wood set, perfect for building.   Versions labeled pre-v are pre-releases, they are marked as Beta. These versions do not contain all features for their update and may not work correctly.   ## **Installation Requirements** ###### [![NeoForged Website](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/138629134?s=160&v=4)](https://projects.neoforged.net/neoforged/neoforge) Neoforge ## **FAQ**
FAQ

Q: When will Simply Natural Biomes be ported to version x?

A: We plan to support 1.21.1 as long as it is the latest stabilised modding version and the latest version of Minecraft. Pre-releases will only be on 1.21.1. 



Q: Will Simply Natural Biomes be ported to another modloader, e.g. Fabric or Forge?

A: It will stay on Neoforge for the foressable future as it is my preferred modloader. However feel free to try something like Sinytra Connector.

 

Q: Can I use this mod in my own Modpacks?

A: Yes, if you provide credit to Timeship Modding. (The development team).

 

Q: Can I create Videos on the mod?

A: Of course, but please mention or show the Curseforge or Modrinith mod page/links. That would help us out a ton.

 

Q: Can I Repost this mod?

A: No. Do not repost this mod anywhere publicly. The only place players should be able to download it is on Curseforge and Modrinith from Timeship Modding.
